---
id: handle-get-org-settings
title: "Get org settings"
description: "Returns organization-level settings (forward_query_params, exclude_ambiguous_chars). The forward_query_params setting is only available on Pro+ tiers"

hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api:

---

  children={"Get org settings"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{id}/settings"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns organization-level settings (forward_query_params, exclude_ambiguous_chars). The forward_query_params setting is only available on Pro+ tiers
